name: PlayCua
absorption_note: Bare-metal computer-use agent with Rust + Python. Rust core → phenoAI as crates/playcua; Python bridge bindings → phenoAI/py-bridge. Fits phenoAI agent workspace alongside Eidolon/Agentora. Computer-use is a key agent capability per ADR-ECO-009.
note: Audited 2026-07-17; Rust+Python polyglot; absorbs cleanly into phenoAI agent workspace.
